name: ExtensionClinicalUseDefinition_Category
title: R5: A categorisation of the issue, primarily for dividing warnings into subject heading areas such as "Pregnancy", "Overdose" (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ClinicalUseDefinition.category` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ClinicalUseDefinition.category` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ClinicalUseDefinition.category` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.category` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.category` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: A categorisation of the issue, primarily for dividing warnings into subject heading areas such as "Pregnancy", "Overdose" (new)

element.short: A categorisation of the issue, primarily for dividing warnings into subject heading areas such as "Pregnancy", "Overdose"
element.definition: A categorisation of the issue, primarily for dividing warnings into subject heading areas such as "Pregnancy and Lactation", "Overdose", "Effects on Ability to Drive and Use Machines".

binding.description: A categorisation for a clinical use information item.
